Dr. Marija Mitic, DDS, D.ASBA Founder & Clinical Director, Healing Dentistry
Meet Your Dentist

Three generations of family dentistry.

Dr. Mitic grew up in a family dental practice led by her grandfather and mother, earned her dental degree in Serbia, and completed the International Dentist Program at Loma Linda University, where she was recognized for her clinical skills and taught on the clinical floor while still a student.

She built her career in biologic dentistry — safe amalgam removal, ceramic implants, and Fotona LightWalker laser treatment — and became a Diplomate in Sleep Medicine in 2025, the credential she's holding above.

Diplomate, ASBA — Sleep Medicine Loma Linda University Kois Center gIDE Institute AACA Member Biomimetic Dentistry
In Her Words

A message from Dr. Mitic.

Beyond The Chair

Training Phoenix's next generation of dental assistants.

Healing Dentistry is also home to Ocean Pointe Dental Assisting Academy — a 12-week, hands-on program run out of the same practice, with a new class of graduates walking the stage every few months.

Insurance & Financing

Making treatment accessible.

We work with most major PPO dental insurance plans and offer flexible financing so cost never gets in the way of care.

Most major PPO plans

We verify your benefits before your visit and file claims on your behalf.

CareCredit & Cherry financing

Low and no-interest monthly payment plans for larger treatment.

Self-pay welcome

Transparent pricing for holistic and cosmetic treatment not covered by insurance.
